sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50545" key="i)ceu/tria" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰξ-εύτρια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, fem. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἰξευτήρ</foreign>, epith. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Τύχη</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.322f</biblScope> </bibl>:—written <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰξευτηρία</orth>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">281e</biblScope> </bibl> (s.v.l.).</entryFree>
